summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of NEW Vehicle Detail View feature in Fahrzeugsuche. All 22 tests passed: clicking vehicle card opens detail view, vehicle title/price/deal badge display correctly, image gallery with 6 images and prev/next navigation works, thumbnails are clickable and update main image, image counter shows correct index (e.g., '1 / 6'), Motor & Technik section shows 6 spec cards, Fahrzeugdetails section shows 6 detail cards, Ausstattung section shows 16 equipment items with checkmarks, Preisentwicklung chart renders with Angebot vs Marktwert lines, Dealer card shows name/location/phone/email/website, Similar vehicles section shows 3 related vehicles, Back button returns to search listing, Track button in detail view toggles state, Share and Track buttons render in header, different vehicle cards show correct data, Track button on listing card uses stopPropagation (does NOT open detail), search/filter still works after returning from detail view.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts ResponsiveContainer may need minWidth/minHeight props to prevent initial render warning

passed_tests: Clicking vehicle card (ML-001) opens detail view (vehicle-detail-view testid appears) - PASS
Detail view shows vehicle title 'BMW 320d Touring M Sport' - PASS
Detail view shows price and deal badge with percentage - PASS
Deal Score bar renders with label and progress indicator - PASS
Image gallery displays with data-testid='image-gallery' - PASS
Gallery prev/next navigation arrows present (gallery-prev, gallery-next) - PASS
Gallery slider changes images when clicking next button - PASS
Gallery slider changes images when clicking prev button - PASS
Thumbnails (thumb-0 to thumb-5) are clickable and update main image - PASS
Image counter shows correct index '1 / 6' and updates on navigation - PASS
Motor & Technik section shows 6 spec cards with icons - PASS
Fahrzeugdetails section shows 6 detail cards (EZ, KM, Farbe, Kraftstoff, HU/AU, Unfallschäden) - PASS
Ausstattung section shows 16 equipment items with checkmarks - PASS
Preisentwicklung chart renders with Angebot vs Marktwert lines and legend - PASS
Dealer card shows dealer name, location, phone, email, website - PASS
Similar vehicles section shows 3 related vehicles with data-testid='similar-ML-xxx' - PASS
Back button (detail-back-btn) returns to search listing view - PASS
Track button in detail view (detail-track-btn) toggles state from 'Tracken' to 'Wird getrackt' - PASS
Share button (detail-share-btn) renders correctly in header - PASS
Contact button (detail-contact-btn) renders with 'Händler kontaktieren' text - PASS
Clicking different vehicle card (ML-003) shows correct Mercedes C 220 data - PASS
Track button on listing card uses stopPropagation - does NOT open detail view - PASS
Search/filter still works after returning from detail view - 'BMW' search returns 3 results - PASS
action_items: MINOR: Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to Recharts ResponsiveContainer in VehicleDetailView.jsx to suppress console warning about chart dimensions
critical_code_review_comments: VehicleDetailView.jsx correctly implements all required features with proper data-testid attributes
Image gallery with 6 images per vehicle (listing image + 5 extras from galleryImages or defaultGallery)
extendedSpecs function dynamically generates Motor & Technik (6 items) and Fahrzeugdetails (6 items) based on vehicle data
Equipment list has 16 items with dynamic M Sportpaket/Sportpaket based on PS
Price history chart uses Recharts AreaChart with proper gradients and dual lines
Similar vehicles logic correctly filters by brand first, then by price proximity
BeispielFahrzeugsuche.jsx correctly integrates VehicleDetailView with selectedVehicle state
Track button on listing card correctly uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent detail view opening
All data is MOCKED - gallery images use Unsplash URLs, vehicle specs generated from listing data
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required, all data is mocked
seed_data_creation: N/A - all vehicle listing data and gallery images are hardcoded in component files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle Detail View feature fully implemented and tested. Features: image gallery with 6 images and prev/next/thumbnail navigation, Motor & Technik (6 specs), Fahrzeugdetails (6 details), Ausstattung (16 equipment items), Preisentwicklung chart with dual lines, Dealer card with contact info, Similar vehicles (up to 3), Back/Share/Track buttons. Detail view is state-based within BeispielFahrzeugsuche (not a separate route). All data is MOCKED/static. Key data-testids: vehicle-detail-view, detail-back-btn, detail-share-btn, detail-track-btn, detail-contact-btn, image-gallery, gallery-prev, gallery-next, thumb-0..5, price-chart, dealer-card, similar-vehicles, similar-ML-xxx.
mocked_api_note: All vehicle listing data, gallery images, extended specs, price history, and similar vehicles logic are hardcoded in VehicleDetailView.jsx and BeispielFahrzeugsuche.jsx. No real API connections.
